zh.lifeSummary: 當Constance Merston於1235年出生時，她的父親Ralph Fitzjohn de Merston24歲，母親Isabel Clinton20歲。她於大約1245年與John Morteyn在英國貝德福爾提爾斯沃斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1293年在英國英格蘭貝德福爾享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Constance Merston于1235年出生时，她的父亲Ralph Fitzjohn de Merston24岁，母亲Isabel Clinton20岁。她于大约1245年与John Morteyn在英国貝德福爾提爾斯沃斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1293年在英国英格兰貝德福爾享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Merston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or other of the numerous places called Marston or Merston, in counties including Bedfordshire, Cheshire, Derbyshire, Gloucestershire, Isle of Wight, Kent, Northamptonshire, Oxfordshire, Shropshire, Staffordshire, Sussex, and Worcestershire. Most of the placenames derive from Old English mersc ‘marsh’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Marson
meanings: English (Midlands): variant of Marston , a common placename which was often spelled and pronounced Marson.
French: habitational name from any of the places so called in Marne and Meuse, or from Marçon in Sarthe. This surname is also found in Germany.

variants.name: Maston
meanings: English: variant of Marston with loss of -r-.

nameMeanings.name: Constance
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval form of the Late Latin name Constantia, which is either a feminine derivative of Constans ( see Constant ) or an abstract noun meaning ‘constancy’. This was a popular name among the Normans, and was borne by, amongst others, the formidable Constance of Sicily ( 1158–98 ), wife of the Emperor Henry VI .

en.lifeSummary: When Constance Merston was born in 1235, her father, Ralph Fitzjohn de Merston, was 24 and her mother, Isabel Clinton, was 20. She married John Morteyn about 1245, in Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1293, in Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Constance Merston est née en 1235, son père, Ralph Fitzjohn de Merston, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Isabel Clinton, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé John Morteyn environ 1245, à Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1293, à Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Constance Merston 1235 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ralph Fitzjohn de Merston 24 und ihre Mutter Isabel Clinton 20. Sie hat um 1245 in Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, England John Morteyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1293 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Constance Merston è nata il nel 1235, sua padre, Ralph Fitzjohn de Merston, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Isabel Clinton, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato John Morteyn circa 1245, nel Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1293, nel Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Constance Merstonが1235年に生まれた時，父Ralph Fitzjohn de Merstonは24歳，母Isabel Clintonは20歳であった。約1245年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアティルスウオルスでJohn Morteynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1293年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Constance Merston(이)가 1235년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph Fitzjohn de Merston(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Clinton(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1245년 영국 베드퍼드실르 틸스워스에서 John Morteyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1293년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Constance Merston nasceu em 1235, seu pai, Ralph Fitzjohn de Merston, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Clinton, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com John Morteyn aproximadamente 1245, em Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1293, em Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Constance Merston родилась в 1235 г., её отцу по имени Ralph Fitzjohn de Merston было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel Clinton, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Morteyn около 1245 г. в местности тилсворт, бедфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1293 г. в местности бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Constance Merston nació en 1235, su papá, Ralph Fitzjohn de Merston, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Isabel Clinton, tenía 20 años. Se casó con John Morteyn aproximadamente 1245, en Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1293, en Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 58 años.
